description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a clean, rectangular footprint. The exterior walls are finished in a light gray color, accented by white trim and a section of wood paneling on one side. The roof is surrounded by a low parapet and features a wood-textured surface, suggesting a rooftop terrace or deck. Windows are arranged asymmetrically, with a large picture window and several smaller windows distributed across the facades. The main entrance is sheltered by a small overhang, and the building sits on a base of gravel surrounded by a green lawn. Minimalist wall-mounted lights and a simple, geometric design emphasize its contemporary architectural style.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof, light gray walls, wood accents, and asymmetrical windows, set on a gravel base with surrounding lawn.
description_view_0: Front view showing a plain facade with a central window, two small side windows, and a gravel base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the wood-textured flat roof, two square windows, and a centered door with wall lights.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a large picture window, a smaller window, and a sheltered entrance with wood paneling.
description_view_3: Opposite side view featuring a wood-paneled wall, a small window, and two wall-mounted lights.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped side and rear windows
